data.title: TRON (TRX) aiming for $0.35 resistance by month-end, analysts eye $0.344-$0.371 range. Technical setup indicates test in 2-3 weeks.
data.description: Analysts are optimistic about TRON (TRX) as it demonstrates bullish potential, with a projected target range of $0.344 to $0.371. The current technical analysis indicates a potential resistance test at $0.35 within the next 2 to 3 weeks, highlighting positive market sentiment.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates SHCO, TGNA, SPNS for violations, breaches on behalf of shareholders.
data.description: In New York on October 9, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focused on investor rights, disclosed a probe into various companies regarding potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary responsibilities to shareholders. One of the scrutinized firms is Soho House & Co Inc. (NYSE: SHCO), concerning its sale transaction.

data.title: Law firm Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating HRZN, RKDA, HNI for shareholder violations. New York, Oct 9, 2025.
data.description: Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm representing investors, has initiated an investigation into various companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and/or violations of fiduciary responsibilities toward shareholders. One of the companies under scrutiny is Horizon Technology Finance Corporation. This investigation seeks to determine if there have been any actions contrary to the mentioned laws and duties. The specific focus is on safeguarding shareholder rights in relation to financial matters and corporate governance. The investigation is ongoing to ascertain the extent of any potential violations.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates MBC, AMWD, CYBR for potential securities violations. Shareholders' rights alert.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a firm specializing in investor rights, announced that it is conducting investigations into various companies regarding potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties to shareholders. One of the companies under scrutiny is MasterBrand, Inc. (NYSE: MBC), concerning its merger activity. Investors are advised to stay updated on this development.

data.title: 13th Annual 2025 Globee® Awards for Leadership winners announced, honoring excellence worldwide.
data.description: Recognizing exceptional leadership achievements from various industries and regions globally, the 13th Annual 2025 Globee® Awards for Leadership winners were unveiled in San Francisco on October 9th, 2025. The prestigious awards honor excellence in leadership across all levels, with a focus on recognizing the outstanding contributions of individuals. This year's edition attracted entries from a diverse range of sectors, with a record number of submissions vying for the esteemed recognition.

data.title: Silver spot price reaches all-time high, surpassing $50 per ounce for the first time ever due to tight supply & industrial use.
data.description: APMEX has reported that the spot price of silver reached a historic milestone, exceeding the previous record of $49.45 set in 1980 and surpassing $50 per troy ounce. This increase is attributed to a combination of factors including tight supply, record industrial usage, and heightened safe haven flows. The new all-time high signals the strong demand for silver in the market and reflects its growing importance as a valuable commodity.

data.title: Cruise Planners introduces travel tech enhancements at convention on Wonder of the Seas, the nation's largest franchise network.
data.description: In Coral Springs, Florida on October 9, 2025, Cruise Planners unveiled new travel technology features at its annual convention on the Wonder of the Seas ship. As the largest home-based travel advisor franchise network in the nation, Cruise Planners presented various free tools aimed at improving efficiency for advisors. These enhancements are designed to streamline processes and enhance the overall travel booking experience.

data.title: 5WPR chosen finalist in Integrated PR & Marketing category at 2025 PR Daily Awards with The Honest Kitchen.
data.description: A well-known PR company based in New York, 5WPR, has recently been recognized for its outstanding work by being chosen as a finalist in the Integrated PR & Marketing category of the prestigious 2025 PR Daily Awards. This recognition highlights the successful collaboration between 5WPR and The Honest Kitchen for their campaign.5WPR is among the largest independently owned PR firms in the United States, showcasing its expertise and excellence in the industry. The campaign with The Honest Kitchen has evidently impressed judges to secure a spot as a finalist, emphasizing the firm's innovative and effective strategies in integrated PR & Marketing.

data.title: BrandONE adds 3 new brand partners: Live 2 B Healthy, Scoop Brothers, Another Nine to its portfolio.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - On October 9, 2025, BrandONE, a prominent franchise development consultancy recognized for its expertise in driving strategic growth and franchise recruitment outcomes, has welcomed three new brand partners - Live 2 B Healthy, Scoop Brothers, and Another Nine. This addition marks a significant expansion for BrandONE as they continue to enhance their portfolio with strong brands.

data.title: Bullish LTC prediction: $128 target, immediate resistance at $124.86. Supported by moving averages and MACD.
data.description: The latest forecast for Litecoin (LTC) suggests a positive trend towards a medium-term target of $128, with an initial resistance level at $124.86. This prediction is backed by increasing moving averages and MACD divergence.
